Why this matters

Joe Rogan built the space where the most consequential conversations of the last decade happened, unscripted and unhurried. Michael Saylor built the most relentless public case for Bitcoin as the foundation of a new financial order.

The overlap is obvious: money, technology, freedom, and the erosion of trust in institutions. This is the conversation dLogos exists to surface, backed by documented audience demand instead of guesswork.
